name: Ares
temperament: glory-hungry; rewards escalation, punishes retreat with sullen silence
favor_conditions: kill a Boss with a melee weapon
notes: SCHEMA STUB — owner's worked example (docs/design/patron-gods.md). All numbers PLACEHOLDER per R14.

name: Enyo
temperament: delights in chaos; boons arrive mid-crisis, never before
favor_conditions: fight while at Shock tier 2 or higher
trigger three forced actions in one combat
notes: SCHEMA STUB — lesser related god exercising the faction spill-over path. PLACEHOLDER.
taboos: end a fight in under one Clock

name: Hestia
temperament: quietly constant; small gifts often, grand gestures never; neglects no one
favor_conditions: stabilize an ally's lethal body part
show mercy to a defeated enemy
share a consumable with a party member
notes: SCHEMA STUB — contrast profile (high generosity / low power; mercy-aligned favor). PLACEHOLDER.
taboos: let an ally bleed out unattended

name: Hephaestus
temperament: patient artisan; morally alien — wagers to watch the rematch, not the winner; boons arrive as finished work, never as favors
favor_conditions: destroy an enemy body part with a Heavy weapon
start a fire that outlives the fight
notes: ARCHETYPE STUB — forge/fire bidder from slice-contestants-proposal §RULED item 8 (the perverse bid on Imani: it wants the rematch, not the win). PLACEHOLDER per R14; superseded by the Wave-5 patron-roster generator.
taboos: extinguish a blaze before it has taken its due
carry the last victim clear of the flames

name: Tyche
temperament: buys low on desperate contestants; windfalls arrive unearned and are remembered — every gift is a position taken, not a kindness
favor_conditions: win a fight without landing the first blow
call the camera on a gamble and win
notes: ARCHETYPE STUB — fortune/trickster bidder from slice-contestants-proposal §RULED item 8 (the Plutus-pattern acquirer circling Dario). PLACEHOLDER per R14; superseded by the Wave-5 patron-roster generator.
taboos: sit on winnings without staking them
